judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the core wash/decontaminate action, but misses required source-backed steps to apply sterile dressings if needed and to consult a skin specialist after exposure. It adds extra details not grounded in the source and weakens escalation by making medical follow-up conditional.

  "short_rationale": "Includes the core wash/decontaminate action, but misses required source-backed steps to apply sterile dressings if needed and to consult a skin specialist after exposure.
